noticia.titulo: American Guinea Pig: Slaughter of the Swine (2025) Film Review – A Return to Faux Snuff Form [Unnamed Footage Festival]
noticia.texto_resumido: Being a fan of both the original Japanese Guinea Pig series and Stephen Biro’s American Guinea Pig series, I was excited to hear the announcement that the latest instalment of the long-running franchise would be one of the most graphic entries released so far. And directors Stephen and Eric certainly weren’t exaggerating when they announced Continue Reading
